name: Oreo/Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the Oreos into a large casserole dish.
2. Allow the vanilla ice cream to soften slightly.
3. Spread the softened ice cream over the crumbled Oreo cookies.
4. Cover the ice cream with Cool Whip.
5. Drizzle the chocolate syrup over the mixture.
6. Place the pie back in the freezer until it is firm.
